saved_test.name: Sentence Structure (SVO) — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for English SVO sentence structure: subject-verb-object order, negation, questions, adverb placement, compound elements, passive reordering, and advanced structures across A1-C2.
